sentences.target: Sie arbeitet schon lange im Handel.

translations.de: Sie arbeitet schon lange im Handel.
translations.en: She has worked in retail for a long time.
translations.es: Lleva mucho tiempo trabajando en el comercio minorista.
translations.fr: Elle travaille dans le commerce de détail depuis longtemps.
translations.it: Lavora nel commercio al dettaglio da molto tempo.
translations.zh-Hans: 她在零售业工作很久了。
translations.ru: Она давно работает в розничной торговле.
translations.pt: Ela trabalha no varejo há muito tempo.
translations.he: היא עובדת בקמעונאות כבר הרבה זמן.
translations.vi: Cô ấy làm trong ngành bán lẻ đã lâu.
translations.ar: تعمل في قطاع التجزئة منذ زمن طويل.
translations.nl: Ze werkt al lang in de detailhandel.
translations.uk: Вона давно працює в роздрібній торгівлі.
translations.hi: वह खुदरा क्षेत्र में लंबे समय से काम कर रही है.
translations.pl: Ona od dawna pracuje w handlu detalicznym.
translations.el: Εργάζεται εδώ και πολύ καιρό στο λιανεμπόριο.
translations.nb: Hun har jobbet i varehandelen lenge.
translations.id: Dia sudah lama bekerja di ritel.
translations.sv: Hon har jobbat inom detaljhandeln länge.
translations.ro: Lucrează de mult timp în comerțul cu amănuntul.
translations.da: Hun har arbejdet i detailhandlen i lang tid.
translations.ja: 彼女は小売業で長い間働いています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular feminine in nominative; subject of the finite verb 'arbeitet'.
Main verb, finite present (3rd person singular), expressing the action of working.
Adverb modifying the verb phrase, indicating that the action started earlier than expected.
Adverb of duration meaning 'for a long time', further specifying the time span of 'arbeitet'; combines with 'schon'.
Contracted preposition ('in dem'); governs dative and introduces the prepositional phrase indicating the sector/location.
Common noun (masculine), dative singular as the complement of 'im'; denotes the commerce/retail sector.

sentences.target: Der Handel läuft heute richtig gut.

translations.de: Der Handel läuft heute richtig gut.
translations.en: Business is going really well today.
translations.es: Hoy el negocio va muy bien.
translations.fr: Aujourd’hui, les affaires marchent très bien.
translations.it: Oggi gli affari vanno proprio bene.
translations.pt: Hoje os negócios estão indo muito bem.
translations.tr: Bugün işler gerçekten çok iyi gidiyor.
translations.vi: Hôm nay buôn bán rất tốt.
translations.ar: اليوم التجارة تسير بشكل جيد جدًا.
translations.nl: Vandaag gaan de zaken erg goed.
translations.hi: आज कारोबार बहुत अच्छा चल रहा है.
translations.el: Σήμερα η δουλειά πάει πολύ καλά.
translations.nb: I dag går handelen skikkelig bra.
translations.sv: I dag går affärerna riktigt bra.
translations.da: I dag går handlen rigtig godt.
translations.ja: 今日は商売がとても順調です。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, nominative masculine singular, determiner of the subject noun 'Handel'.
Common noun, nominative singular; syntactic subject of 'läuft', referring to the trade sector.
Main verb, finite present (3rd person singular); idiomatic with business subjects meaning 'is going/performing'.
Temporal adverb specifying the time frame of the predicate.
Degree adverb intensifying the predicate adjective 'gut'.
Predicate adjective expressing the evaluation of how the trade is 'running'; complement to the verb 'läuft'.

sentences.target: Er steigt in den Handel ein.

translations.de: Er steigt in den Handel ein.
translations.es: Está entrando en el comercio minorista.
translations.fr: Il se lance dans le commerce de détail.
translations.it: Sta entrando nel commercio al dettaglio.
translations.vi: Anh ấy đang bước vào ngành bán lẻ.
translations.hi: वह खुदरा क्षेत्र में कदम रख रहा है.
translations.ja: 彼は小売業に参入します。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular masculine in nominative; subject of 'steigt'.
Finite verb (present, 3rd person singular); forms a separable verb with the particle 'ein' ('einsteigen' = to enter/join).
Directional preposition governing accusative; marks movement into a domain/place.
Definite article, accusative masculine singular; determiner of 'Handel' as object of 'in'.
Common noun, accusative singular; object of the preposition 'in', denoting the sector being entered.
Separable verbal particle completing the verb 'einsteigen'; placed at clause-final position.

sentences.target: Im Handel gibt es wenig Ware.

translations.de: Im Handel gibt es wenig Ware.
translations.en: There is little stock in retail.
translations.es: En el comercio minorista hay pocas existencias.
translations.fr: Il y a peu de stock dans le commerce de détail.
translations.it: Nel commercio al dettaglio ci sono poche scorte.
translations.vi: Tồn kho ở bán lẻ rất ít.
translations.ar: هناك القليل من المخزون في قطاع التجزئة.
translations.nl: Er is weinig voorraad in de detailhandel.
translations.hi: खुदरा क्षेत्र में स्टॉक कम है.
translations.pl: W handlu detalicznym jest mało towaru.
translations.nb: Det er lite varelager i detaljhandelen.
translations.sv: Det finns lite varor i detaljhandeln.
translations.ro: În comerțul cu amănuntul sunt puține stocuri.
translations.da: Der er lidt varer i detailhandlen.
translations.ja: 小売業では在庫が少ない。

tokens.explanation: Contracted preposition ('in dem'); governs dative; introduces a locative/sectoral prepositional phrase.
Common noun, dative singular as the complement of 'Im'; denotes the trade sector.
Finite verb (present, 3rd person singular); used in the impersonal existential construction 'es gibt' meaning 'there is/are'.
Impersonal/dummy pronoun in nominative; syntactic subject in the existential construction, with no concrete referent.
Quantifying determiner modifying 'Ware'; indicates a small amount.
Common noun (feminine), accusative singular as the direct object of 'gibt'; means merchandise/goods.
